summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) feature with 3 roles: superadmin, admin, operator. All backend tests passed (21/21). Fixed a frontend bug where admin could view settings page via direct URL navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Settings view was rendering for admin users when navigating directly to /admin/settings URL. Added role check: adminRole === 'superadmin' to conditionally render SettingsView.
Fixed: Added similar role check for UserManagementView to ensure only superadmin and admin can access it via direct URL.
RBAC implementation is well-structured with require_role decorator in backend and conditional navigation in frontend.
Role badges correctly use different colors: superadmin=red, admin=amber, operator=zinc.
test_credentials: Superadmin: admin@pawstraining.com / <see Railway env var DEMO_ADMIN_PASSWORD>
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users: testadmin@test.com (admin), testop@test.com (operator), adminop@test.com (operator)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC feature fully tested. Key test IDs: admin-role-badge, admin-nav-users, admin-nav-settings, user-management-view, create-user-btn, create-user-form, user-name-input, user-email-input, user-password-input, user-role-select, submit-create-user-btn, delete-user-{id}. Role select shows 'admin' option only for superadmin callers.

features_tested.admin_list_users: ✓ Can list only their created operators
features_tested.admin_cannot_create_admin: ✓ Returns 403 when trying to create admin
features_tested.admin_settings_url_blocked: ✓ Settings view not rendered via direct URL (FIXED)
